name: Primo Wall Panels
description: Primo PVC Wall Panels by Goals Floors are premium 12-inch interior wall panels designed for modern Indian homes and commercial spaces. These panels offer a seamless, waterproof, and termite-proof solution for upgrading walls without paint or polish. Ideal for living rooms, TV units, offices, and damp walls, Primo panels combine aesthetic design with long-lasting durability. Available in multiple textures and wood finishes, they provide a luxury look at an affordable price in India.

seo.title: Primo PVC Wall Panels in India | Price ₹499-₹550 | Designs & Installation | Goals Floors
seo.description: Buy Primo PVC wall panels in India at ₹499 to ₹550. Waterproof, termite-proof & modern designs. Perfect for living room, office & TV panels. Fast delivery in Delhi NCR.

longDescription: Primo PVC Wall Panels in India are one of the most advanced solutions for interior wall cladding. Designed using high-quality PVC and WPC materials, these panels are perfect for Indian conditions, including humid environments and damp walls. With a starting price of ₹499 per panel, Primo panels offer a cost-effective alternative to traditional wall finishes like paint, wallpaper, or laminate. These panels are widely used in living rooms, bedrooms, offices, and commercial interiors to create modern feature walls and TV backdrops. Unlike traditional materials, Primo wall panels are 100% waterproof, termite-resistant, and require zero maintenance. The interlocking system ensures quick and dust-free installation, making them ideal for fast interior upgrades in Delhi NCR and across India. Whether you want a wooden finish, fluted design, or modern texture, Primo PVC wall panels provide a premium aesthetic without the hassle of regular maintenance.
priceDetails: Primo wall panels price in India starts from ₹499 per panel depending on design, thickness, and finish.
comparison: Compared to WPC wall panels, Primo PVC panels are more lightweight, cost-effective, and easier to install, making them ideal for quick interior projects.
installation: Primo wall panels are installed using a simple tongue-and-groove locking system with adhesive. The process is dust-free and can be completed within a few hours.

benefits.title: 100% Waterproof Core
benefits.description: Completely impervious to moisture. The perfect solution for damp walls, basements, and humid climates.

benefits.title: Acoustic Diffusion
benefits.description: The engineered fluted profile naturally breaks up sound waves, reducing echo and making rooms perceptibly quieter.

benefits.title: Zero Maintenance
benefits.description: Say goodbye to periodic painting or polishing. A simple wipe with a microfiber cloth keeps the premium surface pristine.

faqs.question: Why should I choose the Primo Series over standard PVC panels?
faqs.answer: The Primo Series utilizes A+ grade virgin polymers, offering vastly superior impact resistance, deeper tactile textures, and high-micron UV-protected surface films that never fade, unlike cheaper market alternatives.

faqs.question: Can Primo Wall Panels hide wall seepage?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Primo panels are 100% waterproof and create a ventilated barrier over damp walls, completely hiding peeling paint and preventing moisture from entering the room.

faqs.question: Is the installation messy?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Utilizing a precision interlocking tongue-and-groove system with PU adhesive, the installation is completely dust-free, silent, and takes only a few hours for a standard feature wall.

faqs.question: Does it look like real wood?
faqs.answer: Yes, our Classic Wood series features hyper-realistic architectural films that mimic the exact grain, texture, and warmth of natural timber without any of the maintenance drawbacks.
